character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: Dressed in a blue coat with brass buttons and a laced hat, he negotiates with the captain, complains about the cold, and offers terms.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A mutineer and pirate negotiating with the captain, threatening and offering terms.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: The captain, firm in his stance, offers terms to Silver and uses a pipe.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Intervenes when Silver talks about Abe Gray, shows temper.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in the dialogue, but no direct information provided.

character_dossiers.name: Abe Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in the dialogue, but no direct information provided.
